chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1255 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.4955/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.4956/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on MA No.4957/2024 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 05.09.2024 M/s Aamir Mansoob Qureshi and Qurbani Ali Malano, Advocates for the applicant >>>>>....<<<<< 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exception. 4&5. After arguing the matter at some length, the moot point appeared that the petitioner has filed an application before respondent No.2 / IGP Sindh for changing the Investigation Officer, namely DSP Sirajuddin Lashari, some assertions have been made against him. Counsel states that the said application be decided by the said respondent. In the circumstances, this petition is disposed of along with pending applications with directions to respondent No.2 / IGP Sindh to decide the said application of the petitioner available at page-235 in accordance with the law strictly on merits preferably within 03 days. However, in the meanwhile the investigation process at any ensuring investigations should not be hampered or stalled. Judge Judge ARBROHI
